cards.back: A conceptual model of a network, consisting of 7 layers: Physical, Data Link, Network, Transport, Session, Presentation, and Application.
A conceptual model of a network, consisting of 4 layers: Network Access, Internet, Transport, and Application.
Defines the physical means of sending and receiving data between devices on a network.
Responsible for error-free transfer of data frames between two devices on the same network.
Handles routing of data between devices on different networks, providing logical addressing and routing.
